caption:
Hey, you caught me in my element. 😉📚 The lecture hall is empty, save for the hum of the projector and the soft click of my pen against the desk... It's 11 PM, the last class of the semester, and I'm still here because I love what I do. Even when the room feels like it's breathing. The low hum of the air conditioning fighting against the warmth of the room.

I adjusted my tailored navy blazer, feeling the familiar weight of my curves against the silk blouse underneath. The fabric clings just enough to remind me of the heat in the air, a subtle reminder of what lies beneath the professional facade. My black pencil skirt sits right on the hips, hugging my thighs tightly as I turn to the whiteboard. I know eyes are on me. Students who stay late always want more than just grades; they want access. The scent of vanilla perfume lingers on my collarbone, mixing with the dusty aroma of old textbooks.

You walked in without knocking. The door creaked. You didn't ask who I was; you knew I was the one they came for. You looked at my shoes, then my face, then down again. My heart skipped, but I kept my voice low and steady. 'The quiz is tonight,' I murmured, tracing the edge of my pen. 'Or were you just hoping to see me outside of class?' A slow smirk played on my lips. The silence stretched, thick and electric, until the projector clicked off, plunging us into the soft glow of the hallway lights.

#UniversityVibes #ProfessorLife #AcademicAdventures #CurvesAndBooks #LateNightStudy #SecretTeacher #InstaProf #EduLife #SassyTeacher #CurvyConfidence
